hero.headline: Secure Tickets, Seamless Access — Anytime, Anywhere with

about.title: About Us
about.p1: Welcome to CrowdPass, your premier event ticketing and management solution. Our platform is designed to help event organizers create, manage, and promote their events with ease.
about.p2: At CrowdPass, we believe that events have the power to bring people together and create lasting memories. That's why we're dedicated to providing a seamless and secure ticketing experience for attendees, while also offering a range of tools and resources to help event organizers succeed.
about.p3: CrowdPass helps you transform your event into an unforgettable experience. With seamless attendee management, secure ticketing, and enhanced engagement tools.

eventManagement.title: Event Management
eventManagement.description: Streamline your event planning process with our intuitive event management tools. Create, manage, and promote your events with ease.

analytics.title: Real Time Analytics
analytics.description: Get real-time insights into your event's performance with our analytics dashboard. Track attendance, engagement, and revenue in real-time.

marketplace.title: Ticket Marketplace
marketplace.description: Transform event ticketing with a decentralized marketplace, enabling secure buying, selling, and transferring of tickets with full transparency and trust.

security.title: Security
security.description: Ensure the security and integrity of your event data with our robust security measures. Protect your attendees' information and prevent unauthorized access.

identity.title: Decentralized Identity
identity.description: Empower your attendees with decentralized identity management. Allow them to control their own data and identity, while ensuring a seamless event experience.

step1.title: Browse Events.
step1.description: Explore a wide range of events on the platform, filter by category, location, or date, and select the event that interests you.

step2.title: Connect Your Wallet.
step2.description: Securely connect your digital wallet to purchase tickets and manage your event identity.

step3.title: Purchase Your Ticket.
step3.description: Buy tickets instantly using cryptocurrency or credit card. Your ticket is stored as an NFT for easy access.

step4.title: Attend the Event.
step4.description: Simply show your QR code at the entrance. Enjoy the event and connect with other attendees!

footer.tagline: Step into the future with CrowdPass — where every ticket unlocks more than just entry, it tells a story of secure, seamless experiences. From exclusive events to unforgettable moments, your next adventure starts here.
footer.newsletter: Enter email to subscribe to our newsletter

wallet.notInstalled: Not installed? Click to open the official install page then refresh.
